name: agentbridge
description: Workspace root for AgentBridge — an AI-native action layer for web apps.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n demo,studio -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:demo" "npm run dev:studio"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core -w packages/sdk -w packages/scanner -w packages/openapi -w packages/cli -w apps/mcp-server
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p packages/scanner/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p packages/openapi/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/mcp-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
